detaileddescription.para: These tag IDs are used in OBEX application parameter headers for various BIP operations.
Defines the different types of BIP connections as per BIP specification
Defines the role of the device in BIP connection
Defines the state of the underlying transport connection

Defines the supported capabilities of the BIP device (responder). These capabilities indicate the primary BIP services that the device supports. Multiple capabilities can be combined using bitwise OR operations.

briefdescription.para: Image Push feature - allows pushing images to the peer device.
Image Push Store feature - supports storing pushed images permanently.
Image Push Print feature - supports printing pushed images directly.
Image Push Display feature - supports displaying pushed images.
Image Pull feature - allows pulling/retrieving images from the peer.
Advanced Image Printing feature - supports advanced printing operations.
Auto Archive feature - supports automatic archiving of images.
Remote Camera feature - supports remote camera control and image capture.
Remote Display feature - supports remote display control.

detaileddescription.para: Defines the supported features of the BIP device (responder). These features indicate the primary BIP services that the device supports. Multiple features can be combined using bitwise OR operations.

briefdescription.para: Get Capabilities function - supports retrieving device capabilities.
Put Image function - supports receiving/storing images.
Put Linked Attachment function - supports receiving image attachments.
Put Linked Thumbnail function - supports receiving image thumbnails.
Remote Display function - supports remote display operations.
Get Images List function - supports retrieving available image lists.
Get Image Properties function - supports retrieving image metadata.
Get Image function - supports retrieving/sending images.
Get Linked Thumbnail function - supports retrieving image thumbnails.
Get Linked Attachment function - supports retrieving image attachments.
Delete Image function - supports deleting images on the peer device.
Start Print function - supports initiating print operations.
Get Partial Image function - supports retrieving partial image data.
Start Archive function - supports initiating archive operations.
Get Monitoring Image function - supports retrieving monitoring images from remote camera.
Get Status function - supports retrieving device/operation status.

detaileddescription.para: Defines the supported functions of the BIP device (responder). These functions indicate the specific BIP operations that the device can perform. Multiple functions can be combined using bitwise OR operations.

simplesect.para: These values correspond to the BIP specification function definitions and are used to determine which operations can be performed on the peer device.

detaileddescription.para: Defines the state of a BIP OBEX connection

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure
0 on success, negative error code on failure
0 on success, negative error code on failure
0 on success, negative error code on failure
0 on success, negative error code on failure
0 on success, negative error code on failure

briefdescription.para: Set supported capabilities of BIP responder.

detaileddescription.para: Set the supported capabilities bitmask of peer BIP responder to local BIP initiator.

parameterdescription.para: Bitmask of supported capabilities. It is discovered from BIP responder by SDP discovery.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure
This function should be called before establishing any BIP OBEX connections.
The capabilities value is typically obtained through SDP discovery.

briefdescription.para: Set supported features of BIP responder.

detaileddescription.para: Set the supported features bitmask of peer BIP responder to local BIP initiator.

parameterdescription.para: Bitmask of supported features. It is discovered from BIP responder by SDP discovery.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure
This function should be called before establishing any BIP OBEX connections.
The features value is typically obtained through SDP discovery.

briefdescription.para: Set supported functions of BIP responder.

detaileddescription.para: Set the supported functions bitmask of peer BIP responder to local BIP initiator.

parameterdescription.para: Bitmask of supported functions. It is discovered from BIP responder by SDP discovery.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure
This function should be called before establishing any BIP OBEX connections.
The functions value is typically obtained through SDP discovery.

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_bip *bip, struct bt_bip_server *server, enum bt_bip_conn_type type, const struct bt_uuid_128 *uuid, struct bt_bip_server_cb *cb)
memberdef.name: bt_bip_primary_server_register

briefdescription.para: Register a primary BIP OBEX server.

detaileddescription.para: Registers a primary BIP server for the specified connection type and service UUID. Primary servers handle the main BIP operations for their respective service types.

parameterdescription.para: Callback functions for handling server operations

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_bip *bip, struct bt_bip_server *server, enum bt_bip_conn_type type, const struct bt_uuid_128 *uuid, struct bt_bip_server_cb *cb, struct bt_bip_client *primary_client)
memberdef.name: bt_bip_secondary_server_register

briefdescription.para: Register a secondary BIP OBEX server.

detaileddescription.para: Registers a secondary BIP server that works in conjunction with a primary client. Secondary servers handle operations like referenced objects or archived objects.

parameterdescription.para: Callback functions for handling server operations

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_bip *bip, struct bt_bip_server *server, const struct bt_uuid_128 *uuid, struct bt_bip_server_cb *cb)
memberdef.name: bt_bip_primary_image_push_server_register

briefdescription.para: Register Primary Image Push OBEX server.

detaileddescription.para: Convenience function to register a Primary Image Push server.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_bip *bip, struct bt_bip_server *server, const struct bt_uuid_128 *uuid, struct bt_bip_server_cb *cb)
memberdef.name: bt_bip_primary_image_pull_server_register

briefdescription.para: Register Primary Image Pull OBEX server.

detaileddescription.para: Convenience function to register a Primary Image Pull server.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_bip *bip, struct bt_bip_server *server, const struct bt_uuid_128 *uuid, struct bt_bip_server_cb *cb)
memberdef.name: bt_bip_primary_advanced_image_printing_server_register

briefdescription.para: Register Primary Advanced Image Printing OBEX server.

detaileddescription.para: Convenience function to register a Primary Advanced Image Printing server.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_bip *bip, struct bt_bip_server *server, const struct bt_uuid_128 *uuid, struct bt_bip_server_cb *cb)
memberdef.name: bt_bip_primary_auto_archive_server_register

briefdescription.para: Register Primary Auto Archive OBEX server.

detaileddescription.para: Convenience function to register a Primary Auto Archive server.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_bip *bip, struct bt_bip_server *server, const struct bt_uuid_128 *uuid, struct bt_bip_server_cb *cb)
memberdef.name: bt_bip_primary_remote_camera_server_register

briefdescription.para: Register Primary Remote Camera OBEX server.

detaileddescription.para: Convenience function to register a Primary Remote Camera server.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_bip *bip, struct bt_bip_server *server, const struct bt_uuid_128 *uuid, struct bt_bip_server_cb *cb)
memberdef.name: bt_bip_primary_remote_display_server_register

briefdescription.para: Register Primary Remote Display OBEX server.

detaileddescription.para: Convenience function to register a Primary Remote Display server.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_bip *bip, struct bt_bip_server *server, const struct bt_uuid_128 *uuid, struct bt_bip_server_cb *cb, struct bt_bip_client *primary_client)
memberdef.name: bt_bip_secondary_advanced_image_printing_server_register

briefdescription.para: Register Secondary Advanced Image Printing OBEX server.

detaileddescription.para: Convenience function to register a Secondary Advanced Image Printing server. This server handles referenced objects for the printing service.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_bip *bip, struct bt_bip_server *server, const struct bt_uuid_128 *uuid, struct bt_bip_server_cb *cb, struct bt_bip_client *primary_client)
memberdef.name: bt_bip_secondary_auto_archive_server_register

briefdescription.para: Register Secondary Auto Archive OBEX server.

detaileddescription.para: Convenience function to register a Secondary Auto Archive server. This server handles archived objects for the auto archive service.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

detaileddescription.para: Unregisters a previously registered BIP server.

simplesect.para: The specific server can only be unregistered if it is has been disconnected.
0 on success, negative error code on failure

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_bip *bip, struct bt_bip_client *client, enum bt_bip_conn_type type, struct bt_bip_client_cb *cb, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.name: bt_bip_primary_client_connect

briefdescription.para: Connect a primary BIP OBEX client.

detaileddescription.para: Initiates a primary BIP client connection for the specified service type BT_BIP_PRIM_CONN_TYPE_* of bt_bip_conn_type.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_bip *bip, struct bt_bip_client *client, enum bt_bip_conn_type type, struct bt_bip_client_cb *cb, struct net_buf *buf, struct bt_bip_server *primary_server)
memberdef.name: bt_bip_secondary_client_connect

briefdescription.para: Connect a secondary BIP OBEX client.

detaileddescription.para: Initiates a secondary BIP client connection with the specific type BT_BIP_2ND_CONN_TYPE_ of bt_bip_conn_type to the secondary server of BIP initiator that works as primary OBEX client.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_bip *bip, struct bt_bip_client *client, struct bt_bip_client_cb *cb, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.name: bt_bip_primary_image_push_client_connect

briefdescription.para: Connect Primary Image Push OBEX client.

detaileddescription.para: Convenience function to connect a Primary Image Push client.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_bip *bip, struct bt_bip_client *client, struct bt_bip_client_cb *cb, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.name: bt_bip_primary_image_pull_client_connect

briefdescription.para: Connect Primary Image Pull OBEX client.

detaileddescription.para: Convenience function to connect a Primary Image Pull client.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_bip *bip, struct bt_bip_client *client, struct bt_bip_client_cb *cb, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.name: bt_bip_primary_advanced_image_printing_client_connect

briefdescription.para: Connect Primary Advanced Image Printing OBEX client.

detaileddescription.para: Convenience function to connect a Primary Advanced Image Printing client.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_bip *bip, struct bt_bip_client *client, struct bt_bip_client_cb *cb, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.name: bt_bip_primary_auto_archive_client_connect

briefdescription.para: Connect Primary Auto Archive OBEX client.

detaileddescription.para: Convenience function to connect a Primary Auto Archive client.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_bip *bip, struct bt_bip_client *client, struct bt_bip_client_cb *cb, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.name: bt_bip_primary_remote_camera_client_connect

briefdescription.para: Connect Primary Remote Camera OBEX client.

detaileddescription.para: Convenience function to connect a Primary Remote Camera client.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_bip *bip, struct bt_bip_client *client, struct bt_bip_client_cb *cb, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.name: bt_bip_primary_remote_display_client_connect

briefdescription.para: Connect Primary Remote Display OBEX client.

detaileddescription.para: Convenience function to connect a Primary Remote Display client.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_bip *bip, struct bt_bip_client *client, struct bt_bip_client_cb *cb, struct net_buf *buf, struct bt_bip_server *primary_server)
memberdef.name: bt_bip_secondary_advanced_image_printing_client_connect

briefdescription.para: Connect Secondary Advanced Image Printing OBEX client.

detaileddescription.para: Convenience function to connect a Secondary Advanced Image Printing client.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_bip *bip, struct bt_bip_client *client, struct bt_bip_client_cb *cb, struct net_buf *buf, struct bt_bip_server *primary_server)
memberdef.name: bt_bip_secondary_auto_archive_client_connect

briefdescription.para: Connect Secondary Auto Archive OBEX client.

detaileddescription.para: Convenience function to connect a Secondary Auto Archive client.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

detaileddescription.para: Sends a response to an OBEX Connect request received by the server.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

detaileddescription.para: Initiates an OBEX Disconnect from the client side.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

detaileddescription.para: Sends a response to an OBEX Disconnect request received by the server.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

detaileddescription.para: Initiates an OBEX Abort from the client side to cancel ongoing operation.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

detaileddescription.para: Sends a response to an OBEX Abort request received by the server.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

detaileddescription.para: Requests the imaging capabilities from the server. The following OBEX headers should be included for the first request, BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_CONN_ID and BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_TYPE. And the value of type header is BT_BIP_HDR_TYPE_GET_CAPS.

parameterdescription.para: True if this is the final packet

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

detaileddescription.para: Responds to a Get Capabilities request with the server's capabilities. The following OBEX headers should be included for the first response, BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_BODY or BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_END_BODY.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

detaileddescription.para: Requests a list of available images from the server. The following OBEX headers should be included for the first request, BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_CONN_ID, BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_TYPE, BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_APP_PARAM, and BT_BIP_HEADER_ID_IMG_DESC. And the value of type header is BT_BIP_HDR_TYPE_GET_IMAGE_LIST. The application parameter should include ID BT_BIP_APPL_PARAM_TAG_ID_RETURNED_HANDLES, BT_BIP_APPL_PARAM_TAG_ID_LIST_START_OFFSET, and BT_BIP_APPL_PARAM_TAG_ID_LATEST_CAPTURED_IMAGES.

parameterdescription.para: True if this is the final packet

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

detaileddescription.para: Responds to a Get Image List request with the available image list. The following OBEX headers should be included for the first response, BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_APP_PARAM and BT_BIP_HEADER_ID_IMG_DESC. The application parameter should include ID BT_BIP_APPL_PARAM_TAG_ID_RETURNED_HANDLES.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

detaileddescription.para: Requests properties of a specific image from the server. The following OBEX headers should be included for the first request, BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_CONN_ID, BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_TYPE, and BT_BIP_HEADER_ID_IMG_HANDLE. And the value of type header is BT_BIP_HDR_TYPE_GET_IMAGE_PROPERTIES.

parameterdescription.para: True if this is the final packet
Request data buffer (should contain image handle)

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

detaileddescription.para: Responds to a Get Image Properties request with the image properties. The following OBEX headers should be included for the first response, BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_APP_PARAM, and BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_BODY, or BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_END_BODY. The application parameter should include ID BT_BIP_APPL_PARAM_TAG_ID_RETURNED_HANDLES.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

detaileddescription.para: Requests an image from the server. The following OBEX headers should be included for the first request, BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_CONN_ID, BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_TYPE, BT_BIP_HEADER_ID_IMG_HANDLE and BT_BIP_HEADER_ID_IMG_DESC. And the value of type header is BT_BIP_HDR_TYPE_GET_IMAGE.

parameterdescription.para: True if this is the final packet
Request data buffer (should contain image handle and descriptor)

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

detaileddescription.para: Responds to a Get Image request with the requested image data. The following OBEX headers should be included for the first response, BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_LEN, and BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_BODY, or BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_END_BODY.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

detaileddescription.para: Requests a thumbnail linked to a specific image. The following OBEX headers should be included for the first request, BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_CONN_ID, BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_TYPE, and BT_BIP_HEADER_ID_IMG_HANDLE. And the value of type header is BT_BIP_HDR_TYPE_GET_LINKED_THUMBNAIL.

parameterdescription.para: True if this is the final packet
Request data buffer (should contain image handle)

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

detaileddescription.para: Responds to a Get Linked Thumbnail request with the thumbnail data. The following OBEX headers should be included for the first response, BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_BODY, or BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_END_BODY.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

detaileddescription.para: Requests an attachment linked to a specific image. The following OBEX headers should be included for the first request, BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_CONN_ID, BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_TYPE, BT_BIP_HEADER_ID_IMG_HANDLE, and BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_NAME. And the value of type header is BT_BIP_HDR_TYPE_GET_LINKED_ATTACHMENT.

parameterdescription.para: True if this is the final packet
Request data buffer (should contain image handle)

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

detaileddescription.para: Responds to a Get Linked Attachment request with the attachment data. The following OBEX headers should be included for the first response, BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_BODY, or BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_END_BODY.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

detaileddescription.para: Requests a partial image (portion of an image) from the server. The following OBEX headers should be included for the first request, BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_CONN_ID, BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_TYPE, BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_NAME, and BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_APP_PARAM. And the value of type header is BT_BIP_HDR_TYPE_GET_PARTIAL_IMAGE. The application parameter should include ID BT_BIP_APPL_PARAM_TAG_ID_PARTIAL_FILE_LEN, and BT_BIP_APPL_PARAM_TAG_ID_PARTIAL_FILE_START_OFFSET.

parameterdescription.para: True if this is the final packet
Request data buffer (should contain image handle and range info)

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

detaileddescription.para: Responds to a Get Partial Image request with the requested image portion. The following OBEX headers should be included for the first response, BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_BODY, or BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_END_BODY.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

detaileddescription.para: Requests a monitoring image from a remote camera. The following OBEX headers should be included for the first request, BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_CONN_ID, BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_TYPE, and BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_APP_PARAM. And the value of type header is BT_BIP_HDR_TYPE_GET_PARTIAL_IMAGE. The application parameter should include ID BT_BIP_APPL_PARAM_TAG_ID_STORE_FLAG.

parameterdescription.para: True if this is the final packet

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

detaileddescription.para: Responds to a Get Monitoring Image request with the monitoring image. The following OBEX headers should be included for the first response, BT_BIP_HEADER_ID_IMG_HANDLE and BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_BODY, or BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_END_BODY.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

detaileddescription.para: Requests status information from the server. The following OBEX headers should be included for the first request, BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_CONN_ID, and BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_TYPE. And the value of type header is BT_BIP_HDR_TYPE_GET_STATUS.

parameterdescription.para: True if this is the final packet

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

detaileddescription.para: Responds to a Get Status request with status information.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

detaileddescription.para: Sends an image to the server. The following OBEX headers should be included for the first request, BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_CONN_ID, BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_TYPE, BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_NAME, and BT_BIP_HEADER_ID_IMG_DESC. And the value of type header is BT_BIP_HDR_TYPE_PUT_IMAGE.

parameterdescription.para: True if this is the final packet
Request data buffer (image data and metadata)

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

detaileddescription.para: Responds to a Put Image request. The following OBEX headers should be included for the first response, BT_BIP_HEADER_ID_IMG_HANDLE.

parameterdescription.para: Response data buffer (may contain image handle)

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

detaileddescription.para: Sends a thumbnail linked to a specific image. The following OBEX headers should be included for the first request, BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_CONN_ID, BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_TYPE, and BT_BIP_HEADER_ID_IMG_HANDLE. And the value of type header is BT_BIP_HDR_TYPE_PUT_LINKED_THUMBNAIL.

parameterdescription.para: True if this is the final packet
Request data buffer (thumbnail data and image handle)

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

detaileddescription.para: Responds to a Put Linked Thumbnail request.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

detaileddescription.para: Sends an attachment linked to a specific image. The following OBEX headers should be included for the first request, BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_CONN_ID, BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_TYPE, BT_BIP_HEADER_ID_IMG_HANDLE, and BT_BIP_HEADER_ID_IMG_DESC. And the value of type header is BT_BIP_HDR_TYPE_PUT_LINKED_ATTACHMENT.

parameterdescription.para: True if this is the final packet
Request data buffer (attachment data and image handle)

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

detaileddescription.para: Responds to a Put Linked Attachment request.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

detaileddescription.para: Sends a remote display command to the server. The following OBEX headers should be included for the first request, BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_CONN_ID, BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_TYPE, BT_BIP_HEADER_ID_IMG_HANDLE, and BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_APP_PARAM. And the value of type header is BT_BIP_HDR_TYPE_REMOTE_DISPLAY. The application parameter should include ID BT_BIP_APPL_PARAM_TAG_ID_REMOTE_DISPLAY.

parameterdescription.para: True if this is the final packet

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

detaileddescription.para: Responds to a Remote Display request. The following OBEX headers should be included for the first response, BT_BIP_HEADER_ID_IMG_HANDLE.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

detaileddescription.para: Requests deletion of a specific image on the server. The following OBEX headers should be included for the first request, BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_CONN_ID, BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_TYPE, and BT_BIP_HEADER_ID_IMG_HANDLE. And the value of type header is BT_BIP_HDR_TYPE_DELETE_IMAGE.

parameterdescription.para: True if this is the final packet
Request data buffer (should contain image handle)

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

detaileddescription.para: Responds to a Delete Image request.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

detaileddescription.para: Initiates a print job on the server. The following OBEX headers should be included for the first request, BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_CONN_ID, BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_TYPE, and BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_APP_PARAM. And the value of type header is BT_BIP_HDR_TYPE_START_PRINT. The application parameter should include ID BT_BIP_APPL_PARAM_TAG_ID_STORE_FLAG.

parameterdescription.para: True if this is the final packet

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

detaileddescription.para: Responds to a Start Print request.

parameterdescription.para: Response data buffer (may contain job ID)

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

detaileddescription.para: Initiates an archive operation on the server. The following OBEX headers should be included for the first request, BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_CONN_ID, BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_TYPE, and BT_OBEX_HEADER_ID_APP_PARAM. And the value of type header is BT_BIP_HDR_TYPE_START_ARCHIVE. The application parameter should include ID BT_BIP_APPL_PARAM_TAG_ID_STORE_FLAG.

parameterdescription.para: True if this is the final packet

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

detaileddescription.para: Responds to a Start Archive request.

parameterdescription.para: Response data buffer (may contain job ID)

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

briefdescription.para: Add Image Descriptor header to buffer.

detaileddescription.para: Adds an Image Descriptor header to the OBEX packet buffer. The descriptor contains format and encoding information for the image.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

briefdescription.para: Add Image Handle header to buffer.

detaileddescription.para: Adds an Image Handle header to the OBEX packet buffer. The handle is a UTF-16 encoded string that uniquely identifies an image.

parameterdescription.para: Length of handle data in bytes
Pointer to UTF-16 encoded handle data

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure

briefdescription.para: OBEX Type header for Get Capabilities operation.
OBEX Type header for Get Image List operation.
OBEX Type header for Get Image Properties operation.
OBEX Type header for Get Image operation.
OBEX Type header for Get Linked Thumbnail operation.
OBEX Type header for Get Linked Attachment operation.
OBEX Type header for Get Partial Image operation.
OBEX Type header for Get Monitoring Image operation.
OBEX Type header for Get Status operation.
OBEX Type header for Put Image operation.
OBEX Type header for Put Linked Thumbnail operation.
OBEX Type header for Put Linked Attachment operation.
OBEX Type header for Remote Display operation.
OBEX Type header for Delete Image operation.
OBEX Type header for Start Print operation.
OBEX Type header for Start Archive operation.

detaileddescription.para: Byte sequence, length prefixed with a two-byte unsigned integer
Null terminated, UTF-16 encoded Unicode text length prefixed with a two-byte unsigned integer

briefdescription.para: Primary Image Push server callback initializer.

detaileddescription.para: Helper macro to initialize callbacks for Primary Image Push server

briefdescription.para: Primary Image Pull server callback initializer.

detaileddescription.para: Helper macro to initialize callbacks for Primary Image Pull server

briefdescription.para: Primary Image Print server callback initializer.

detaileddescription.para: Helper macro to initialize callbacks for Primary Image Print server

briefdescription.para: Secondary Image Print server callback initializer.

detaileddescription.para: Helper macro to initialize callbacks for Secondary Image Print server

briefdescription.para: Primary Auto Archive server callback initializer.

detaileddescription.para: Helper macro to initialize callbacks for Primary Auto Archive server

briefdescription.para: Secondary Auto Archive server callback initializer.

detaileddescription.para: Helper macro to initialize callbacks for Secondary Auto Archive server

briefdescription.para: Primary Remote Camera server callback initializer.

detaileddescription.para: Helper macro to initialize callbacks for Primary Remote Camera server

briefdescription.para: Primary Remote Display server callback initializer.

detaileddescription.para: Helper macro to initialize callbacks for Primary Remote Display server
